languages.text: Жители колонии не только смогли закрепиться на этой территории, но и построили несколько производств, оправдав затраты Вольного Торговца и свои незначительные жизни.

traits.locale_text: Жители колонии не только смогли закрепиться на этой территории, но и построили несколько производств, оправдав затраты Вольного Торговца и свои незначительные жизни.
Жители колонии не только смогли закрепиться на этой территории, но и построили несколько производств, оправдав затраты Вольного Торговца и свои незначительные жизни.

languages.text: The local populace has not only managed to gain a foothold on this world, but has even begun small-scale manufacturing, justifying the Rogue Trader's expenses and their insignificant lives.
languages.original_text: Жители колонии не только смогли закрепиться на этой территории, но и построили несколько производств, оправдав затраты Вольного Торговца и свои незначительные жизни.

traits.locale_text: The local populace has beaten the odds and managed to gain a foothold on this world, thereby making their lives somewhat useful and your expenses somewhat justified.
The local populace has beaten the odds and managed to gain a foothold on this world, thereby making their lives somewhat useful and your expenses somewhat justified.
The local populace has not only managed to gain a foothold on this world, but has even begun small-scale manufacturing, justifying the Rogue Trader's expenses and their insignificant lives.

The local populace has not only managed to gain a foothold on this world, but has even begun small-scale manufacturing, justifying the Rogue Trader's expenses and their insignificant lives.
The local populace has not only managed to gain a foothold on this world, but has even begun small-scale manufacturing, justifying the Rogue Trader's expenses and their insignificant lives.

languages.text: Die einheimische Bevölkerung hat es nicht nur geschafft, auf dieser Welt Fuß zu fassen, sondern hat sogar eine kleine Produktion aufgebaut, die die Ausgaben der Schurkenhändler und ihr unbedeutendes Leben rechtfertigt.
languages.original_text: The local populace has not only managed to gain a foothold on this world, but has even begun small-scale manufacturing, justifying the Rogue Trader's expenses and their insignificant lives.

traits.locale_text: Die einheimische Bevölkerung hat es nicht nur geschafft, auf dieser Welt Fuß zu fassen, sondern hat sogar eine kleine Produktion aufgebaut, die die Ausgaben der Schurkenhändler und ihr unbedeutendes Leben rechtfertigt.

languages.text: La population locale a non seulement réussi à s'implanter sur ce monde, mais a même commencé à fabriquer des produits à petite échelle, justifiant ainsi les dépenses des Rogue Trader et leurs vies insignifiantes.
languages.original_text: The local populace has not only managed to gain a foothold on this world, but has even begun small-scale manufacturing, justifying the Rogue Trader's expenses and their insignificant lives.

traits.locale_text: La population locale a non seulement réussi à s'implanter sur ce monde, mais a même commencé à fabriquer des produits à petite échelle, justifiant ainsi les dépenses des Rogue Trader et leurs vies insignifiantes.

languages.text: La población local no sólo ha conseguido afianzarse en este mundo, sino que incluso ha empezado a fabricar a pequeña escala, lo que justifica los gastos del Rogue Trader y sus insignificantes vidas.
languages.original_text: The local populace has not only managed to gain a foothold on this world, but has even begun small-scale manufacturing, justifying the Rogue Trader's expenses and their insignificant lives.

traits.locale_text: La población local no sólo ha conseguido afianzarse en este mundo, sino que incluso ha empezado a fabricar a pequeña escala, lo que justifica los gastos del Rogue Trader y sus insignificantes vidas.

languages.text: Yerel halk bu dünyada kendine bir yer edinmeyi başarmakla kalmamış, Haydut Tüccar'ın masraflarını ve önemsiz hayatlarını haklı çıkaracak küçük ölçekli üretime bile başlamıştır.
languages.original_text: The local populace has not only managed to gain a foothold on this world, but has even begun small-scale manufacturing, justifying the Rogue Trader's expenses and their insignificant lives.

traits.locale_text: Yerel halk bu dünyada kendine bir yer edinmeyi başarmakla kalmamış, Haydut Tüccar'ın masraflarını ve önemsiz hayatlarını haklı çıkaracak küçük ölçekli üretime bile başlamıştır.
